properties.Observation: During the rainy season when too much water flows, Bank erosion occurs
properties.Description:
Paving available stone and Planting trees

Dry rubble packing (with locally found rubble, size over 225mm )-Around the spring

Vegetative cover improving around the spring with Areca nut seedling in 1.5m x 1.5m grid, Kumbuk/ Mee/ Godapara/ Kaduru/ Aththi
